name: reactive::early_return::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (!guard.active) return; payload.value; });

name: reactive::early_return::watch_effect_arrow::namespace
source: import * as Vue from 'vue'; const guard = Vue.reactive({ active: true }); const payload = Vue.ref(0); Vue.watchEffect(() => { if (!guard.active) return; payload.value; });

name: reactive::early_return::watch_effect_function::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(function () { if (!guard.active) return; payload.value; });

name: reactive::if_consequent::watch_effect_arrow::named

name: reactive::if_alternate::watch_effect_arrow::named
source: import { reactive, ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; const guard = reactive({ active: true }); const payload = ref(0); watchEffect(() => { if (guard.active) { sink(); } else { payload.value; } });
